      have h₅ : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ recursorRight (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) a s ω) (fun ω s ↦ recursorRight (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) b s ω) 𝔓 := by

          have h₇ : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := h₄

have h_disjoint : ∀ (s : ℕ), Disjoint (fun ω ↦ a ∈ stepsUntil s ω) (fun ω ↦ b ∈ stepsUntil s ω) := by
    intro s
    rw [Disjoint]
    intro ω hωa hωb
    have h₁ := hωa
    have h₂ := hωb
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h₁ h₂
    obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := h₁
    obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := h₂
    have h₃ : a ≠ b := hab
    simp_all [stepsUntilmem, mem_Iic, Nat.lt_succ_iff]
    <;> omega
  
  have h_indepedence : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) 𝔓 := by
    have h₁ : ∀ (s : ℕ), IndepFun (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) 𝔓 := by
      intro s
      have h₂ : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) 𝔓 := by
        have h₃ : IsCountablyGenerated (measurableSpace α) := by
          infer_instance
        have h₄ : IsCountablyGenerated (measurableSpace ℕ) := by
          infer_instance
        -- Use the fact that the two sets are disjoint to prove that the functions are independent
        have h₅ : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) 𝔓 := by
          have h₆ : Disjoint (fun ω ↦ a ∈ stepsUntil s ω) (fun ω ↦ b ∈ stepsUntil s ω) := h_disjoint s
          sorry
        exact h₅
      exact h₂
    -- Use the fact that the two functions are independent for each s to prove the overall independence
    have h₆ : IndepFun (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) 𝔓 := by
      sorry
    exact h₆
  
  exact h_indepedence

have h_iIndepA : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) => rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := by
    have h_iIndep : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) => rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := by
      refine iIndepFun_nat_iff_of_nonempty.mpr (indepFun_of_le_ind (fun n ↦ ?_) )
      have h₀ : (fun ω : ℕ → α × ℝ => rewardByCount a (n + 1) ω) ≤ fun ω => 1 := by
        intro ω
        simp only [rewardByCount]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, le_of_lt]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith) <;>
        (try simp_all [Set.sup, le_of_lt]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Set.le_of_mem])
        <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try linarith)
      <;>
      (try simp_all)
      <;>
      (try norm_num)
      <;>
      (try linarith)
    exact h_iIndep
  have h_iIndepB : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) => rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := by
    have h_iIndep : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) => rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := by
      refine iIndepFun_nat_iff_of_nonempty.mpr (indepFun_of_le_ind (fun n ↦ ?_) )
      have h₀ : (fun ω : ℕ → α × ℝ => rewardByCount b (n + 1) ω) ≤ fun ω => 1 := by
        intro ω
        simp only [rewardByCount]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, le_of_lt]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith) <;>
        (try simp_all [Set.sup, le_of_lt]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Set.le_of_mem])
        <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try linarith)
      <;>
      (try simp_all)
      <;>
      (try norm_num)
      <;>
      (try linarith)
    exact h_iIndep
  have h₁ : IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount b s ω) 𝔓 := by
    -- Use the fact that iIndepFun implies independence of finite subsets
    have h₂ : (∀ n, IndepFun (fun ω => (fun ω s => rewardByCount a s ω) ω n) (fun ω => (fun ω s => rewardByCount b s ω) ω n) 𝔓) := by
      intro n
      simpa using h_iIndepA.1 n
    -- Extend this to the product of all natural numbers
    have h₃ : IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount b s ω) 𝔓 := by
      have h₄ : iIndepFun.comp (fun ω s => rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount b s ω) := by
        -- Use the fact that the functions are iIndepFun
        exact iIndepFun.comp h_iIndepA h_iIndepB
      -- Use the fact that iIndepFun implies independence of finite subsets
      exact h₄
    exact h₃
  exact h₁
